title: Combat Amenities 2D Tridents
description: A textures packs that utilizes features from Combat Amenities to make tridents use a 2D model
body:
### 2D Tridents
Uses a feature from the mod Combat Amenities (Required to work) to turn tridents into a 2D sprite!

Includes two texture packs! One contains a vanilla+ 2D trident, and one contains a 2D trident in my style!
